title: A Topic That Has Nothing to Do with Us
overview: Kei Nagai is a good student whose life turned upside down when he was struck by a truck. After this accident he discovers that he is an immortal (ajin). Feeling shocked and panic, he runs away to an isolated place. Now he can't trust anyone but his childhood friend Kaito.

title: Why Is This Happening to Me? I Didn't Do Anything Wrong!
overview: Tosaki takes the pursuit of government by Ajin. Kei and Kaito are attacked by bandits in search of rewards.

title: I Think I'm Done For
overview: Kaito and Kei are seen and pursued by another motorcyclist. Meanwhile Yu Tosaki recognises Sato, an Ajin hunter at the original accident scene. The other motorcyclist causes the boys to crash, but Kaito recovers and knocks him unconscious.

title: Have You Ever Seen a Black Ghost?
overview: Izumi fight against a being in Eriko's hospital room. After saying goodbye to Kaito, Kei receives a mysterious invitation.

title: Trash Who Only Ask for Help When They Are Desperate
overview: Kei goes through horrible experiences in a government laboratory and Tanaka encourages you to free his dark side. Sato planning a rescue mission.

title: I Adore Killing
overview: Sato starts killing people in the lab. Kei tries to stop him and discovers that Ajin has a weak spot.

title: We Will Cover It All Up!
overview: With his job at stake, Tozaki takes drastic measures to find out more about Ajin. Sato takes his emphasis on putting into practice a new plan.

title: Brace for Impact
overview: Ko flees after Fact reveals his evil plans. Who takes refuge to practice the invocation of his ghost.

title: Wait, Let's Talk Over This Again
overview: Sato prepares to attack. Ko discovers the hideout of Kei and begs for help. Tosaki gets a surprise visit.

title: It Starts Decaying the Moment It's Created
overview: Tozaki make new discoveries. Neighbors Mrs. Yamanaka suspect Kei. Sato finalizes his plan.

title: Now Then, It's Showtime
overview: In the supposed day of the attacks, the scenario of the city is shocking. Sato prepares for action with your team.

title: Man, I'm Exhausted
overview: With the country all online assisted Tozaki employs a new tactic to deter Sato. Kei loses its disguise.

title: Satō-san, It's Your Fault Everything's Messed Up
overview: Mr Keita reports Kei Nagai to the police to claim a reward. Yu Tosaki orders all available forces to the area to catch Kei. When Kei is confronted by the police, he uses his Black Ghost to delay them allowing him to escape into the woods. He uses Ko Nakano’s phone to throw the police off his trail, but Tosaki realizes it's a ruse and closes in.

title: It Has Become Tiresome
overview: Satō emerges from the rubble as he blew up an existing tunnel below to escape being crushed by Nagai's plan.  Satō begins to hunt Nagai and the others as they attempt one last attempt as stopping him before the military unleashes a gas attack.

title: Everyone Around Here Is an Idiot
overview: Kei and Ko train their bodies and begin to develop strategies to fight Tosaki. Kei spends time talking about his IBM with Ogura, realizing Kei's ghost is an extreme abnormality. While they begin to strategize, Sato makes his next move taking down a plane with his second target.

title: I'm Always Scared
overview: Sato is able to assassinate another off of the list. Nagai and Tosaki begin planning their counterattack against Sato. Nagai begins to struggle with the behavior of his IBM, wondering if he himself has to change. Tosaki also let's Nagai know Kaito's current condition.

title: It's Sickening, Right?
overview: Kaito is in prison after helping Kei escape. He encounters prisoners ganging up on another prisoner after a successful escape attempt. The prisoner wants no help from Kaito. It begins to be clear the prisoner is hiding something.

title: Kuro-chan, Please!
overview: Kei continues his training. Tosaki attempts to get the Minitser's schedule. The Minister refuses, which leads Tosaki to attempt to steal it. However, the American investigators interfere.

title: It's Tough Being a Lapdog
overview: Tosaki has been captured. Izumi rushes back to the hideout and insists they rescue him. Initially refusing, Nagai ultimately leads a team to rescue Tosaki from the Americans.

title: Kuro-chan, Just Once More, Please!
overview: Nagai and the group pursue the Americans and Tosaki. Izumi manages to catch up with them and ultimately rescue Tosaki. Unfortunately, this means they missed their window to catch Sato.

title: Things Are Getting Kind of Tough in This Country
overview: Tosaki manages to get his team allowed into the building where Sato's next target is. Just as the clock ticks closer, a truck rushes in and sets off an E.M.P. bomb, rendering all electronics and new anti-Ajin guns useless. Sato charges in for an old fashioned gun fight.

title: You're the One Who Is Getting in the Way
overview: Ajin are humans that cannot die. Seventeen years ago, they first appeared on a battlefield in Africa. From then on, more of their kind are discovered within the human society. Their rarity in appearance means that, for experimental purposes, the government will generously reward anyone who captures one. In the present day, for what a certain high school student expects to be a typical summer holiday, his life is about to turn unexpected...

title: I Won't Do It
overview: Nagai and the group return after being defeated by Sato. Nagai struggles to deal with his failures. Sato continues towards his third and final wave, an Ajin run Japan. Tosaki tries to mobilize everyone once more to stop Sato, but Nagai refuses.

title: This Really Is War
overview: Unrest begins as Satō-san releases a chemical weapon onto the population. People begin trying to attack the families of Ajin. Nagai saves his sister with the assistance of Kaito. Nagai entrusts his sister into Kaito's care.

title: It Sounds Interesting, So I Guess That's Okay
overview: People from Satō's group desert and make contact with Nagai. The US plans on releasing the chemical weapons on Satō in the sewers. Tosaki is called and asked for assistance, which leads Nagai and the group to go after Satō once more.

title: I Make Promises Too, Satō-san
overview: Although he was caught off his guard, Sato has one last plan: to kill the rest of the team.
